meta.title: Jubilee — Serving the Holy Land and Jerusalem
meta.description: Jubilee is a Christian association devoted to Israel and Jerusalem. Discover our mission, our wines from the Holy Land and our handwritten parchments from Jerusalem.

hero.badge: An association serving the Holy Land
hero.title: In the heart of Jerusalem, a mission across generations
hero.subtitle: Jubilee unites Christians and friends of Israel around one calling: to honor the Holy Land, support Jerusalem and pass on a living spiritual heritage.

intro.title: Who is Jubilee
intro.text: Jubilee is a non-profit association rooted in faith and turned toward Jerusalem. We build a bridge between peoples, support projects in the Holy Land, and offer meaningful products — from wines of Israel to handwritten parchments from Jerusalem — whose every purchase sustains our mission.
intro.verse: "Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: may those who love you be secure." — Psalm 122:6

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: To preserve, honor and pass on the spiritual heritage of the Holy Land, by supporting concrete projects in Jerusalem and its surroundings.

jerusalem.title: Jerusalem at the center
jerusalem.text: Where biblical history comes alive. Every action of Jubilee is turned toward the Holy City, its people and the promise of restoration.
jerusalem.verse: "Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth, is Mount Zion." — Psalm 48:2

wines.title: Wines of the Holy Land
wines.text: White, red and rosé wines from the land of Israel. A tasting that connects your table to the Promised Land.

parchments.title: Parchments of Jerusalem
parchments.text: Personalized parchments, handwritten in Jerusalem. A chosen text, carefully calligraphed: a heritage to pass on.

finalCta.text: Every gesture matters. Support Jerusalem, discover our products, be part of the story.

about.title: The origins of Jubilee
about.subtitle: A mission rooted in faith, turned toward Jerusalem and the gift of passing on.
paragraphs: Jubilee is a non-profit association devoted to the Holy Land. Our commitment is rooted in the promises of Scripture and in the love of Jerusalem, a city at the heart of history and hope.

We are a bridge between peoples and between Christian communities and friends of Israel, united by one conviction: to honor the spiritual heritage of the Promised Land and to support Jerusalem in tangible ways.

Our work brings together the presentation of the mission, support for projects in the Holy Land, and meaningful products — wines of Israel and handwritten parchments from Jerusalem — whose every purchase extends our commitment.
Through our work, we seek to strengthen the bonds between communities, to pass on a living heritage, and to make known the beauty and depth of the Holy Land.
about.verse: "I will give to you and to your descendants after you the land of your sojournings, all the land of Canaan, for an everlasting possession." — Genesis 17:8

values.title: Faith
values.text: A mission rooted in Scripture and hope.

values.title: Authenticity
values.text: Handcrafted products and a sincere commitment.

values.title: Passing on
values.text: Connecting generations to the heritage of Jerusalem.

mission.title: Our mission in the Holy Land
mission.subtitle: To preserve, honor and pass on the spiritual heritage of Jerusalem and its surroundings.
mission.intro: Jubilee supports concrete projects in the heart of the Holy Land. Each initiative aims to protect a sacred heritage and to serve those who live there.

projects.title: The Old City of Jerusalem
projects.text: Supporting the preservation of the sacred heart of the Old City, where biblical history comes alive, to honor and protect its heritage.

projects.title: Jerusalem surroundings
projects.text: Supporting the preservation of the ancient lands and biblical sites surrounding the Holy City.

projects.title: The baptismal site of Qasr al-Yahud
projects.text: Preserving and enhancing the revered baptismal site on the Jordan River, a major pilgrimage destination, by improving its preservation and accessibility.

mission.verse: "Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth, is Mount Zion." — Psalm 48:2

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Jubilee, our products and shipping.

items.a: Jubilee is a non-profit Christian association devoted to the Holy Land and Jerusalem, supporting projects and offering meaningful products.

items.q: Where do your wines come from?
items.a: Our white, red and rosé wines come from the land of Israel and are selected for their quality.
You choose the desired text; it is then handwritten in Jerusalem and shipped with production tracking.
Yes. Shipping times and costs depend on the destination country and are shown at checkout.

items.q: How does my purchase support the mission?
items.a: Every purchase contributes to funding Jubilee's projects in the Holy Land.

shop.title: The Jubilee shop
shop.subtitle: Meaningful products: wines of Israel and handwritten parchments from Jerusalem.
shop.comingSoon: Our online catalogue is coming very soon. Every purchase supports Jubilee's mission.

mentions.text1: The Jubilee website is published by the Jubilee Association, a non-profit association based in Paris, France. Publishing Director: Jubilee Management Team.
mentions.text2: This website is hosted by Cloudflare Inc. (101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA) and deployed via Cloudflare Pages.
mentions.text3: All content present on the site (texts, images, designs, logos) is protected by copyright. Any unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.
mentions.text4: For any inquiries, you can write to us via the contact form on the site or directly at contact@jubilee-israel.org.

privacy.text1: We collect personal information only when you provide it voluntarily (account creation, ordering products, or subscribing to our newsletter). This data includes your name, email address, shipping address, and phone number.
privacy.text2: Your personal data is used exclusively to manage and deliver your orders, respond to your inquiries via the contact form, and send you our newsletters if you have consented.
privacy.text3: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. Your payment information is processed in a fully secure manner by our payment provider Stripe. We use secure protocols to protect all data transmissions.
privacy.text4: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, modify, rectify, and delete data concerning you. To exercise this right, please contact our team by email.

terms.text1: These general terms of sale (CGV) govern all sales of products (wines from the Holy Land, personalized parchments) concluded on the Jubilee Association website.
terms.text2: The prices of our products are indicated in Euros (EUR), all taxes included, excluding shipping costs. The Association reserves the right to modify its prices at any time. The order is validated after full payment.
terms.text3: We ship domestically and internationally. Delivery times are provided for information purposes. For non-personalized products (wines), you have a 14-day right of withdrawal. Hand-calligraphed parchments being personalized, they cannot be returned or refunded.
terms.text4: The sale of wine is strictly reserved for adults of legal age in their country of residence. By validating your order containing wine, you certify that you have reached the required legal age.

cookies.text1: A cookie is a small text file stored on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember your actions and preferences over a given period.
cookies.text2: We use cookies that are strictly necessary to ensure the functioning of the shop (managing your cart, maintaining your login session) and statistical cookies to measure our site's audience.
cookies.text3: You can configure your browser to refuse the storage of cookies or to be warned when they are sent. Please note that disabling necessary cookies may alter the functioning of the online shop.
cookies.text4: By browsing our site and accepting our information banner, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
